name: VisionSathi
description: Offline-first visual assistant app for blind and visually impaired users, powered by Moondream 3

userStories.title: Project Setup with Expo
userStories.description: Initialize React Native project with Expo, TypeScript, and Expo Router. Configure ESLint, Prettier, and basic folder structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Expo dev server starts without errors
App renders on iOS and Android simulators

userStories.title: Design System Foundation
userStories.description: Create design tokens (colors, typography, spacing) and base UI components (Button, Text, Card, Icon) following the dark-first high-contrast theme.

userStories.title: Camera Integration
userStories.description: Implement camera view with expo-camera. Request permissions, show live preview at 40% opacity, capture frames as base64.
acceptanceCriteria: Camera permission requested on first launch
Works on both iOS and Android

userStories.title: Home Screen Layout
userStories.description: Build the main home screen with camera preview, capture button (64px+), and mode selector (Read, Nav, Chat shortcuts).

userStories.title: Accessibility Labels and Roles
userStories.description: Ensure all interactive elements have proper accessibilityLabel, accessibilityRole, and accessibilityHint. Test with VoiceOver.

userStories.title: FastAPI Backend Setup
userStories.description: Initialize FastAPI project with health endpoint, CORS configuration, and basic project structure.

userStories.title: Moondream Integration (Backend)
userStories.description: Load Moondream 3 model, create /analyze endpoint that accepts base64 image and returns description.

userStories.title: Mobile API Client
userStories.description: Create API service in mobile app to communicate with FastAPI backend. Handle online/offline detection.
acceptanceCriteria: API client configured with base URL
analyze() function sends image to backend

userStories.title: Quick Tap Flow (Online)
userStories.description: Implement end-to-end flow: tap button → capture frame → send to API → display response. Show loading state during processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Loading indicator shows during API call
Error state shown if API fails

userStories.title: ONNX Runtime Setup
userStories.description: Integrate ONNX Runtime Mobile into React Native app. Load quantized Moondream model for on-device inference.
acceptanceCriteria: Model loading doesn't block app start

userStories.title: Offline Fallback Logic
userStories.description: Implement decision logic: prefer cloud when online, fallback to local ONNX when offline or on timeout.
acceptanceCriteria: Cloud used when online and enabled
User notified of which mode used

userStories.title: Text-to-Speech Integration
userStories.description: Integrate expo-speech for TTS. Automatically speak responses after they arrive. Include pause/resume controls.

userStories.title: Speech Speed Settings
userStories.description: Add speech speed control in settings (Slow 0.75x, Normal 1.0x, Fast 1.25x). Persist preference.

userStories.title: Verbosity Settings
userStories.description: Add verbosity control (Brief, Normal, Detailed). Affects prompt sent to Moondream for response length.

userStories.title: Conversation Mode (Hold to Talk)
userStories.description: Implement hold-to-talk: holding button freezes camera, activates STT, captures voice question.

userStories.title: Multi-turn Conversation Context
userStories.description: Maintain conversation context using Moondream's 32k window. Follow-up questions reference previous image/responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Context clears on new image capture

userStories.title: Settings Screen
userStories.description: Build full settings screen with Voice, Processing, and Accessibility sections. All preferences functional.
acceptanceCriteria: Voice section: speed, verbosity, voice picker

userStories.title: Text Reading Mode (OCR)
userStories.description: Implement Read mode that optimizes for text extraction. Uses OCR-specific prompt, reads text aloud in order.
acceptanceCriteria: Text read aloud in reading order

userStories.title: Navigation Assistance Mode
userStories.description: Implement Navigate mode that focuses on obstacles, paths, and spatial awareness. Structured response with warnings.

userStories.title: Graceful Degradation UI
userStories.description: Show clear feedback when falling back to offline mode. Indicate processing source (cloud/local) in response.

userStories.title: Animations and Transitions
userStories.description: Add smooth animations: fade transitions between states, pulsing indicators during processing, button press effects.

userStories.title: Sound Effects
userStories.description: Add audio feedback sounds: capture click, processing pulse, success chime, error tone. Respects sound setting.

userStories.title: Conversation History Screen
userStories.description: Add history screen showing past conversation sessions. Allow replay of previous responses.
